item.text: I’ll run turn 012 with Village into Peddler for engine tempo. On board, the immediate tactical goal is to preserve the 1 HP marksman by moving it out while combining ranged fire and raider damage to remove the P1 raider on `center-center-south`.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
DECK_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-012.deck.json
BOARD_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-012.board.json
DECK_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-012.deck.result.json
BOARD_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-012.board.result.json
WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-012.win-events.json
TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-012.terminal-win-events.json

cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-012\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"gold\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-012\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"peddler\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-012\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"village\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
    if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
      cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-012\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
      bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"
    fi
  fi
fi

cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-012\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-010-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-012\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-010-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-012\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-010-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
    bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"
  fi
fi

SUMMARY="P2 chained Village into Peddler, bought Gold, saved the wounded marksman, advanced both raiders, and focused down the P1 raider on center-south."
REASONING="Village into Peddler keeps actions flowing, adds draw and money, and supports another Gold buy. On board, P2 needs to keep contesting centers while reducing P1'"'s threats, so the 1 HP marksman retreats into firing position, the front raider moves adjacent, the scout holds center-east, and their combined attacks remove the central P1 raider while the second raider advances.\"

COMMIT_LOG="'$(mktemp)
if ! bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win >"$COMMIT_LOG" 2>&1; then
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
  if grep -q "winEvents'"\\|terminalWinEvents\" \""'$COMMIT_LOG"; then
    python3 - "$COMMIT_LOG" "$WIN_EVENTS" "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" <<'"'PY'
import json, sys
log=open(sys.argv[1]).read()
def extract(label):
    i=log.find(label)
    if i<0: return None
    j=log.find('[', i)
    if j<0: return None
    depth=0
    for k in range(j, len(log)):
        if log[k]=='[': depth+=1
        elif log[k]==']':
            depth-=1
            if depth==0:
                return json.loads(log[j:k+1])
for label,path in [('winEvents',sys.argv[2]),('terminalWinEvents',sys.argv[3])]:
    arr=extract(label)
    if arr is not None:
        open(path,'w').write(json.dumps(arr,separators=(',',':'))+'\\n')
PY
    EXTRA=()
    [ -s \""'$WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--win-events "$WIN_EVENTS")
    [ -s "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--terminal-win-events "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS")
    bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win "${EXTRA[@]}"
  else
    exit 1
  fi
else
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
fi
rm -f "$COMMIT_LOG"

bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win "$RUN/timeline.json"

node - <<'"'NODE'
const fs=require('fs');
const da=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-012.deck.json','utf8'));
const ba=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-012.board.json','utf8'));
console.log('DECK_LINE', JSON.stringify(da.actions));
console.log('BOARD_LINE', JSON.stringify(ba.actions));
console.log('RATIONALE Village into Peddler preserves engine tempo and buys Gold. The wounded marksman backs out while still contributing damage, scout holds center-east, and raider pressure removes the P1 raider on center-center-south while the second raider advances.');
NODE"

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-012`.

Deck line: Village, Peddler, move to buy, buy Gold, end turn.

Board line: marksman moved from `(6,5)` to `(5,6)`; raider moved from `(4,6)` to `(6,6)`; second raider advanced from `(1,8)` to `(4,7)`; raider and scout attacked `P1-raider-turn-007-1`.

Rationale: Village into Peddler keeps the engine moving and buys another Gold. The wounded marksman backs out of immediate danger, the scout holds `center-east`, and the raiders keep pressure on the center while advancing P2’s board presence.
